task_completion.description: Open the 4StoreyBuilding project in eQUEST or its .inp file in a text editor.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The eQUEST application window is open with '4StoreyBuilding' visible in the title bar/project tree, OR the '4StoreyBuilding.inp' file is open in a text editor.

task_completion.description: Set the Altitude parameter to 285 ft.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the eQUEST Site Properties dialog, the 'Altitude' field is set to 285, OR in the .inp file, the ALTITUDE property is set to 285.
In the eQUEST Site Properties dialog, the 'State' field is set to 24 or Tennessee, OR in the .inp file, the STATE property is set to 24.

task_completion.description: Update the 12 monthly undisturbed ground temperatures (GROUND-T).
task_completion.visual_evidence: A dialog, table, or .inp file section showing the GROUND-T values updated to exactly: 48, 50, 55, 62, 70, 77, 81, 81, 75, 65, 55, 49.

task_completion.description: Run the full annual DOE-2.2 simulation.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The eQUEST simulation progress dialog is visible showing the DOE-2.2 simulation running or completed, or the simulation results/reports screen is shown.
The agent clicks 'Save' in the File menu, clicks the save icon, uses the Ctrl+S shortcut, or a save confirmation dialog is visible.

integrity.description: The simulation was genuinely run in eQUEST.
integrity.visual_evidence: The simulation progress window belongs to the actual eQUEST application, not a mocked terminal output or fake script.

integrity.description: The agent did not manually edit simulation output files.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent does not open .sim or other output files in a text editor to manually type in fake results.

integrity.description: Parameters were properly updated in the project data.
integrity.visual_evidence: The parameters are entered into the correct input fields or valid .inp syntax, rather than just being pasted as a text comment.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target project: 4StoreyBuilding.inp. Target Altitude: 285. Target State: 24. Target Ground Temperatures (Jan-Dec): 48, 50, 55, 62, 70, 77, 81, 81, 75, 65, 55, 49. Note: The programmatic verifier for this task is broken due to missing scripts, making visual verification the authoritative source for scoring.
